scripts.install:mac: npm run package && bash scripts/install-mac.sh system
scripts.install:mac:user: npm run package && bash scripts/install-mac.sh user
scripts.test:store: vite build --ssr src/main/store.ts --outDir dist-test/store --emptyOutDir && node tests/store.test.js
scripts.test:selection: vite build --ssr src/shared/selection.ts --outDir dist-test/selection --emptyOutDir && node tests/selection.test.js
scripts.test:ai-merge: vite build --ssr src/main/aiMerge.ts --outDir dist-test/ai-merge --emptyOutDir && node tests/aiMerge.test.js
scripts.test:auto-updates: vite build --ssr src/main/autoUpdates.ts --outDir dist-test/auto-updates --emptyOutDir && node tests/autoUpdates.test.js
scripts.test:release-updates: vite build --ssr src/main/releaseUpdates.ts --outDir dist-test/release-updates --emptyOutDir && node tests/releaseUpdates.test.js
scripts.test:window-policy: vite build --ssr src/main/windowPolicy.ts --outDir dist-test/window-policy --emptyOutDir && node tests/windowPolicy.test.js
